2347160.name: Strayed Lights Soundtrack
2347160.description:
Journey to a dark and oneiric world with this fully mastered, high-quality soundtrack for the dreamlike action-brawler Strayed Lights. Each track will bring you into the fleeting, dreamlike world of the game. Each track represents the mood of the world and the journeys of the characters within it.

Strayed Lights was composed and arranged by the immensely talented Austin Wintory to life the journey of a faint light, seeking transcendence.
